query:
WITH exhausted AS (
            DELETE FROM work_lease
            WHERE expires_at < NOW()
              AND attempts >= $1
            RETURNING event_id
        )
        UPDATE event_log
        SET publish_status = 'failed',
            publishing_started_at = NULL,
            last_publish_error = 'lease retries exhausted'
        WHERE id IN (SELECT event_id FROM exhausted)
